title: TINT_ASSERT(to != nullptr) in src/tint/lang/wgsl/resolver/uniformity.cc:157
bounty_rationale: baseline report of potential memory corruption in a highly privileged process (GPU)
description_snippet:
## REPRODUCE
1. Download Dawn as follow: https://dawn.googlesource.com/dawn/+/HEAD/docs/building.md
2. gn gen out/tint
3. ninja -C out/tint tint
4. out/tint/tint poc.wgsl

## CRASH LOG
```
../../src/tint/lang/wgsl/resolver/uniformity.cc:157 internal compiler error: TINT_ASSERT(to != nullptr)
